target:
Shinpei's curry… it's been a while…
I'll eat it.

Ah, it's different now.
Only Shinpei can make this taste.
(What if Ushio was killed by the Shadow!?)

Are you okay?
You're all pale…
Maybe you should take some medicine?

Probably just stress.
Eat and go to sleep right away.
You can go take a bath first, okay?

I'm fine.
I think it's just my head being confused from everything.

Sorry during dinner.
I'll go get some fresh air for a bit…

Ah, okay.
Leave the curry as is.

(A mark that looked like a wire cut…
If that was someone's work?)

(No good… What's going on…
I can't handle this at all!!!
I'm going to throw up…)

What's wrong with you, Mio!
Staring blankly at your own house…

(Who is that guy outside…
And wearing a uniform…)

Hahah…
You two fighting or something---

(…N-no… it's not…
Not him, not him, not him!!!)

(Wh-what was that…?
Mio's Shadow got up…!!!)

(No, the Shadow split into two…
One of them got up…?)

(And it looked just like Tetsu…
What's going on…!?)

I get it, I get it.
Mio's always impatient.
If someone sees, it'll cause a commotion.

(Curses, can't see clearly…
Was it the Shadow Tetsu touching Tetsu's body?)

(Tetsu's body… vanished…
Just by the Shadow Tetsu touching it…)

(The only thing left was a
<color=#GF_TIPS_091>stain</color> where Tetsu vanished!!!)
No chance of promotion without her…
(The Shadow was replacing people like this…)

Huh?
Did you not switch back yet?

…I failed this morning.
It would've been easier if they sent me to the hospital…

I hate being slow.
Let's go in now!
You have the gun too~! Here.

Firing in this quiet night would make a huge noise…
We're not in America, you know!!!
…So this is a reconnaissance, huh? Today…

(So that's it!
At this time… it's the same as when we talked about the window and the Yoshikawa line before!!)

Eavesdropping is bad, Shinpei-kun.
You'll get the death penalty!
(So red… I'm going to die… like this…)

Ushio!?
What…! I can't hear you…!!!
